data.content: Implementation review APPROVED. Changes in beat-table.tsx correctly address the requirement: InlineSummary parent changed from flex to inline-grid (shrink-wraps to content, no excess parent width), max-w reduced from 75% to 56.25% (25% smaller as requested), SummaryColumn basis-[37.5%] removed (grid-cols-2 handles sizing). Layout regression test updated. All quality gates pass (lint, typecheck, tests, build). Note: branch work/foolery-813a-parent-width not yet merged to main — merge needed during shipment.
